title: Core Rulebook (disambiguation)
content:
'''Core Rulebook''' can refer to any of three basic rulebooks released by [[Wizards of the Coast]] for the ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'' or any of the three rulebooks published by [[Fantasy Flight Games]] for their ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying]]'' game.

*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Core Rulebook]]''
*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Revised Core Rulebook]]''
*''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game Saga Edition Core Rulebook]]''
*[[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Core Rulebook]]
*[[Star Wars: Edge of the Empire Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Edge of the Empire'' Core Rulebook]]
*[[Star Wars: Force and Destiny Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Force and Destiny'' Core Rulebook]]

{{Disambig}}
